hypothesis.strategy: Expand the 5 lowest-scoring articles with 2025-2026 papers (sourced from web search), improve cross-category linking, add SVG diagram to HF article.
hypothesis.reasoning: Memory from session 6 confirms that adding 2025-2026 sourced content with footnotes is the most reliable improvement strategy (+10-14 pts per article). All 5 targets had currency < 60 or sourcing < 70. Web search yielded 24 new papers across 5 topics. Cross-category link expansion should boost linking scores for autoresearch (66) and blockchain (78).

result.lesson: Matched predicted delta exactly (+2.0). All 5 targeted articles improved by +8 to +13 points. huggingface-papers-api had the largest gain (+12.7) driven by adding Current State section with 7 new references. blockchain-ai-optimization gained +11.3 from 5 new blockchain-AI convergence papers. autoresearch gained +10.1 primarily from cross-category link expansion (66→100). The web search for new papers was highly effective — real arxiv IDs from 2025-2026 surveys and conference papers boost both currency and sourcing reliably. New lowest is aide (78.7).
